product_results.title: JETech Magnetic Case for iPhone 16 Pro 6.3-Inch with Camera Control Button, Compatible with MagSafe, Translucent Matte Back Slim Shockproof Phone Cover (Black Titanium)

summary.text: Customers find this cellular phone case to be a pretty good case with good quality products. The case provides superb protection and good coverage for their devices. Users appreciate the fit, appearance, and functionality of the case. However, customers have mixed opinions regarding the camera control, durability, and grip features.

authors_reviews.title: Great case with superb protection!
authors_reviews.text: Pretty good case with all the features that one might want- slim, MagSafe, good drop protection, and camera housing cover. One small complaint is that camera control button slider can sometimes glitch (not register the slides) but I never use the button so doesn’t bother me.
authors_reviews.author: Arefin

authors_reviews.title: Good quality case!
authors_reviews.text: Very good quality. The magnetic charging ring at the back has a strong magnet. I also like the matte color it has less finger marks. All in all good quality case.
authors_reviews.author: Roen

authors_reviews.title: great protection
authors_reviews.text: great case, ive had zero issues!
authors_reviews.author: Matthew

authors_reviews.title: A good balance of protection and functionalities!
authors_reviews.text: After trying for a dozen different brand, finally settled for this! Have been hunting for a thin case with barebone protection for quite some time. There are thin cases, but either not magsafe or feels cheap. This one is a bit bulky to my liking honestly. However, it completed all other requirements, namely back camera cover; camera button protection and encapsulated magsafe. All other cases tends to leave a mark or worst, scratch the back of phone over time.So why don't I gave full mark? The camera button protector seems to lower the sensitivities, so it's a tricky to use it now.
authors_reviews.author: Chilly

authors_reviews.title: Simple and functional case
authors_reviews.text: Simple and functional case, it’s one of the case which has camera module covered instead of big square cutout and come with camera control button built in. The price is reasonable as well, nothing to complain about.
authors_reviews.author: Ed

authors_reviews.title: iPhone 16 Pro
authors_reviews.text: Decent case. I find it a bit slippery and got dirty pretty fast. Although I do love how the camera cover and side buttons are covered. MagSafe is pretty strong as well.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer
